mapper.sql: select product_id, product_code, product_name, category_id, brand_id, supplier_id, specification, unit, standard_price, cost_price, min_stock, max_stock, warning_stock, product_image, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from prd_product
mapper.insert: insert into prd_product(product_code, product_name, category_id, brand_id, supplier_id, specification, unit, standard_price, cost_price, min_stock, max_stock, warning_stock, product_image, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{brandId}, #{supplierId}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{standardPrice}, #{costPrice}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock}, #{warningStock}, #{productImage}, #{status}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{remark})
mapper.delete: update prd_product set del_flag = '2' where product_id = #{productId}

update prd_product set del_flag = '2' where product_id in
#{productId}
